name: collectivist-treaty-relief
description: Tests v0.41 broadening of collectivistIsolation trigger. Nicaragua and Honduras both start with individualist=−0.5 (collectivist). Phase 1 (T1–T3): No active treaties → collectivistIsolation fires for both. Phase 2: A non_aggression treaty is created at T4 between Nicaragua and Costa Rica → Nicaragua now has one active treaty (not a tribute_receiver clause) → collectivistIsolation should stop at T6. Honduras (control group, no treaties) continues to show isolation. Validates: 'any active treaty = 0 treaties' is the relief condition, not 'has tribute_receiver'.

payload.comment: T2: control group — honduras also isolated, no treaties
T6: nicaragua has 1 active non_aggression treaty → activeTreatyCount=1 > 0 → isolation relieved (v0.41: any active treaty relieves, not just tribute_receiver)
T6: honduras has no treaties → isolation continues (confirms relief is treaty-gated)
